name: Hershey Great American Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt.
In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla until creamy. Add eggs; beat well. Gradually add the flour mixture, beating well. Stir in milk chocolate chips and nuts (if desired). Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool slightly on a wire rack; remove from the cookie sheet and cool completely.
Pan Recipe:
Spread batter evenly in a greased 15-1/2 x 10-1/2 x 1-inch jelly roll pan. Preheat the oven to 375°F and bake for 20 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool completely before cutting into bars (about 4 dozen).
